title: Taler (clone commando)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Taler
RC-1133 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth=[[32 BBY]] |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Theta Squad]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Darman, take that E-Web and hold this position.|Taler gives orders to Darman|}} '''Taler''', also known by the number '''RC-1133''', was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. He, along with many other clones, was bred by the [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] cloners on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] for use in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. Taler was trained as a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] and assigned to serve as the [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] of [[Theta Squad]], commanding fellow commandos [[Darman Skirata|Darman]], [[Vin (clone commando)|Vin]], and [[Jay (clone commando)|Jay]]. The squad was first deployed in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|first battle]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. There they fought against [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]] serving the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], and supported [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]], another squad of commandos. After Darman cleared a doorway for Delta with explosives, Theta squad covered their rear as they progressed. Taler, along with Vin and Jay were overwhelmed by Geonosians and killed as they provided cover leaving Darman as the sole surviving member of Theta. ==Behind the scenes== Taler was first mentioned in ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'', a novel written by [[Karen Traviss]] and released in 2004. He later received mentions in several of the following books in the [[Republic Commando]] series. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=RC-1133 |es=RC-1133 |pl=RC-1133 }} [[Category:Clone commandos]] [[Category:Males]]
